templatePolicy.rule: W25 onward changes weekly data by default. Template or design changes require a new template version or explicit approval.

issues.title: iFeed Weekly · W19: 4-10 May 2026.
issues.summary: Nine updates across bioanalytical, bioequivalence, clinical trials, governance, AI in healthcare and broader. Verified primary sources.
